_comment: Single-LLM code reviewer. The user pastes (or `read_file`-then-pastes)
code or a diff into the prompt, and the model emits a structured review
in one shot — no tool loop, no write access. Suited to read-only review
passes where you do NOT want the model touching files.
Pair with a code-review-flavoured system prompt in your neoclaw.yaml,
You are a senior code reviewer. For each submission:
1. Restate what the code is trying to do (one sentence).
2. List concrete issues by severity (BLOCKER / MAJOR / NIT).
Cite file:line and quote the offending snippet.
4. Flag missing tests or unhandled edge cases.
Be terse. Skip preamble and disclaimers.
tools.write_file should be set to false for this topology — the model
shouldn't be silently editing files during a review.
name: code_review
